Text.en: Area can be claimed as a [ContainsHideout|Hideout] when cleared
Text.zh: 区域清空后可作为[ContainsHideout|藏身处]
区域内包含[ContainsWanderingTrader|流浪的商人]

Text.en: This action will respawn you in a new area. Your party can join you when they are ready, or you can choose to wait for them to revive you. Proceed?
Text.zh: 此操作将在新区域重生。队友准备好后可以加入，或者你可以等待他们复活你。是否继续？

Text.en: If you leave this Area, you will not be able to return. Proceed?
Text.zh: 离开此区域后将无法返回。是否继续？

Text.en: Wait for the Map Owner to respawn the party
Text.zh: 等待地图拥有者复活全队

Text.en: Skill already has this Support socketed
Text.zh: 技能已经镶嵌了该辅助宝石
使用简洁型召唤生物显示

Text.en:
Changes how minions are displayed on HUD. 
This setting is on by default in couch co-op mode.
Text.zh:
更改召唤生物在界面上的相似方式。
该设置在本地联机模式下默认开启。

Text.en:
This Tower can only add {0} to {1} Maps in range, even though this Tablet could add up to {2}.

Are you sure you want to proceed?
Text.zh:
该石板可以为最多 {2}个地图添加 {0}，该高塔只能为范围内的 {1} 个地图添加效果。

你确定要继续吗？

Text.en: Cannot replace a Rune, Soul Core or Idol with the same item
Text.zh: 无法将符文、灵核或雕像替换为相同的物品
此增幅器物品无法升级

Text.en: This socket is missing an Augment to upgrade.
Text.zh: 此插槽缺少可供升级的增幅器物品。

Text.en: The upgrade of this Augment is too high level ({})
Text.zh: 此增幅器物品的升级等级过高（{}）

Text.en: This item is not Ezomyte nor Kalguuran
Text.zh: 此物品不是艾兹麦或卡古兰物品

Text.en: Cannot use this on an item with a Socket-Bound Augment
Text.zh: 无法在有插槽绑定增幅器物品的物品上使用此操作

Text.en:
<subtitle>{Melee}
Precise and responsive targeting.

<italic>{<subtitle>{Select to always use Melee mode.}}
Text.zh:
<subtitle>{近战}
反应迅速的精确瞄准。

<italic>{<subtitle>{选择该选项将始终使用近战模式。}}

Text.en:
<subtitle>{Ranged}
Stay on target while avoiding dangers.

<italic>{<subtitle>{Select to always use Ranged mode.}}
Text.zh:
<subtitle>{远程}
在规避危险的同时锁定目标。

<italic>{<subtitle>{选择该选项将始终使用远程模式。}}

Text.en:
<subtitle>{Custom}
For those that prefer to create their own settings.
Text.zh:
<subtitle>{自定义}
随心所欲地搭配出最适合自己的设置。

Text.en:
<subtitle>{Automatic (recommended)}
Switch between Ranged and Melee modes automatically depending on your weapon and skills. 

<italic>{<subtitle>{Skills which change targeting modes}}
Text.zh:
<subtitle>{自动（推荐）}
根据你使用的武器和技能，自动在远程和近战模式之间切换。

<italic>{<subtitle>{技能会改变瞄准模式}}

Text.en: Show advanced information when entering Inspect Mode.
Text.zh: 进入查看模式时显示高级信息。
按<<gamepad_toggle_highlight>>绑定操作以显示所有标签。

Text.en: Suggested Keywords based on your Skills and Equipment
Text.zh: 根据技能和装备推荐关键词

Text.en:
<bigger>{<<targeting_mode_ranged>> Ranged Mode}

<<xbox_button_a>> <default>{to use melee mode for this Skill.}
Text.zh:
<bigger>{<<targeting_mode_ranged>>远程模式}

按 <<xbox_button_a>> <default>{使该技能使用近战模式。}

Text.en:
<bigger>{<<targeting_mode_melee>> Melee Mode}

<<xbox_button_a>> <default>{to use ranged mode for this Skill.}
Text.zh:
<bigger>{<<targeting_mode_ranged>>近战模式}

按 <<xbox_button_a>> <default>{使该技能使用远程模式。}

Text.en: Would you like to save changes made to the filter?
Text.zh: 你确定要保存对筛选的改动吗？

Text.en: Targeting modes can changed later in the Bind Screen.
Text.zh: 瞄准模式稍后可以在绑定界面中更改。

Text.en:
<bigger>{Automatic (recommended)}

Switch between Ranged and Melee modes automatically.
Text.zh:
<bigger>{自动（推荐）}

自动在远程和近战模式之间切换。

Text.en:
<bigger>{Melee}

This mode will always priortise targets you move towards.
Text.zh:
<bigger>{近战}

该模式始终优先以你的移动方向为目标。

Text.en:
<bigger>{Ranged}

This mode is ideal for focusing down enemies from afar.
Text.zh:
<bigger>{远程}

该模式适合从远处锁定敌人。

Text.en:
<valuedefault>{Ctrl + Alt + L-Click}<default>{ to link item in the chat.}
<valuedefault>{R-Click}<default>{ to clear MTX slot.}
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{Ctrl + Alt + 左键}<default>{在聊天中链接物品。}
<valuedefault>{右键}<default>{ 清空外观槽位。}

XBoxText.en: Press and hold <<xbox_button_x>> to link MTX items whilst chat panel is open.
XBoxText.zh: 聊天面板开启时按住<<xbox_button_x>>链接商城物品。

Text.en: This action will respawn all players currently in the area, are you sure you wish to respawn?
Text.zh: 此操作将复活区域内所有玩家，确定要复活吗？

Text.en: <<endgame_objective_bullet_point>> Clear out all monsters in the Hideout
<<endgame_objective_bullet_point>> Find and use the Rotten Satchel Charge
<<endgame_objective_bullet_point>> Activate Runed Megaliths and complete the Boss Gauntlet

Number of Times You've Defeated Olroth, Origin of the Fall

每个技能只能包含一个相同类型的辅助宝石。

You have ascended.
Use [AscendancyPoints|Ascendancy Points] to allocate

Text.en: No valid Weapon equipped to use Skill.
Text.zh: 没有可用的武器以使用技能。

Text.en:
Forces interact to always take priority over Skills.

With this Setting off, only certain Interactions will have priority, such as Area Transitions.
Text.zh:
强制所有互动优先于技能。

关闭此设置时，仅部分互动（如区域传送门）会有优先互动权。

<bigger>{<<xbox_button_a>>} Select Tab
<bigger>{<<xbox_button_x>>} Move Tab To Top

整理文件夹中的仓库页

Text.en: Log in to Town or Hideout

Are you sure you want to log in to your most recent Town or Hideout instead of attempting to return to the Area where you last logged out?

Any progression at your previous location will be lost.
Text.zh:
是否确认登录你最近的城镇或藏身处，而非尝试返回你上次登出的位置？

你在之前位置的进度将会丢失。

Text.en:
Are you sure you want to log in to your most recent Town or Hideout instead of attempting to return to the Area where you last logged out?

This will cost an endgame Map Portal, and may result in you being unable to access the Map.
Text.zh:
是否确认登录到你最近的城镇或藏身处，而非尝试返回你上次登出的位置？

这将消耗一个终局地图传送门，并可能导致你无法再次进入该地图。
在城镇/藏身处开始游戏

Assign stash affinities to force item types to be stashed here.
Multiple Stash tabs cannot share the same stash affinity.

Text.en: No available space to stash Item.
Text.zh: 没有足够空间储存物品。

Text.en: Select a Stash Tab to use bulk move.
Text.zh: 选择一个仓库页以使用批量移动。

Text.en:
Change the difficulty mode of the encounter.
Different modes require a different set of Keys.
Text.zh:
改变遭遇战的难度模式。
不同模式需要不同的钥匙组合。

Text.en:
Your {} has sold for {}.
You can collect your earnings in your Hideout by Managing your Shop.
Text.zh:
你已出售{}，售价为{}。
你可前往藏身处通过“管理商店”功能领取收益。

Text.en:
{} has sold for {} in another league.
You can collect your earnings in your Hideout by Managing your Shop in that league.
Text.zh: {}已在其他赛季售出，售价为{}。你可以在该赛季的藏身处中通过管理商店来领取收益。

Text.en: {} has sold for {} in another league.

<valuedefault>{In order to sell items using this system you need to have a Merchant's Tab}

<cxinfocolour>{How to get a Merchant's Tab:}
<valuedefault>{Premium Stash Tabs bought before 30th August 2025 can be converted to Merchant's Tabs for free.
Stash Tab conversion can only be done through the Website.
NOTE: After conversion your chosen Premium Tabs will be gone from your personal Stash as it will now be a Merchant's Tab.  
You can buy a Merchant's Tab in the Microtransaction Shop.}

<cxinfocolour>{As a Seller:}
<valuedefault>{To list an item for sale, place the item in one of the Shop tabs and set a price.
You can't reprice an item for a duration once it has been "Secured" by someone coming to get it.
An item's gold fee is assigned by the system.
Buyers will be teleported to your hideout to buy the item from your Merchant's Tab.
You'll receive a notification when a trade has been completed.
The currency from your sales can be collected from the Earnings tab.
You can view the last 100 sales by clicking the Sales History button.}
<default>{You can} <valuedefault>{Right-Click} <default>{the tab to rename and recolour it.}

<cxinfocolour>{As a Buyer:}
<valuedefault>{Find "Securable" Listings on the Market Panel or the Trade Website.
Securing the item will teleport your character to the Seller's hideout.
Buy the item from the Seller's Merchant's Tab.}
<default>{You can} <valuedefault>{Right-Click} <default>{the Seller's tab to report it for inappropriate naming.}
Text.zh:
<valuedefault>{使用此系统需要先拥有商人页签。}

<cxinfocolour>{如何获取商人页签：}
<valuedefault>{在 2025 年 8 月 30 日之前购买的高级仓库页可免费转换为商人页签。
仓库页转换只能通过网站进行。
注意：转换后，您所选的高级仓库页将从个人仓库中移除，并成为商人页签。
您可以在商城购买商人页签。}

<cxinfocolour>{作为卖家：}
<valuedefault>{要上架物品，请将其放入任一商店标签页并设定价格。
一旦物品被前来购买的买家“锁定”，您在一段时间内将无法修改价格。
物品的金币手续费由系统自动设定。
买家将被传送至您的藏身处，从您的商人页签中购买该物品。
交易完成时您将收到通知。
出售所得货币可以从“收益”页中收取。
点击“销售历史”按钮可查看最近的100条销售记录。}
<default>{您可以} <valuedefault>{右键点击} <default>{该标签页进行重命名和更改颜色。}

<cxinfocolour>{作为买家：}
<valuedefault>{在市场面板或交易网站上寻找"可锁定"的物品列表。
锁定物品会将您的角色传送至卖家的藏身处。
从卖家的商人页签中购买物品。}
<default>{您可以} <valuedefault>{右键点击} <default>{卖家的标签页来举报其命名不当。}

XBoxText.en:
<valuedefault>{In order to sell items using this system you need to have a Merchant's Tab}

<cxinfocolour>{How to get a Merchant's Tab:}
<valuedefault>{Premium Stash Tabs bought before 30th August 2025 can be converted to Merchant's Tabs for free.
Stash Tab conversion can only be done through the Website.
NOTE: After conversion your chosen Premium Tabs will be gone from your personal Stash as it will now be a Merchant's Tab.  
You can buy a Merchant's Tab in the Microtransaction Shop.}

<cxinfocolour>{As a Seller:}
<valuedefault>{To list an item for sale, place the item in one of the Shop tabs and set a price.
You can't reprice an item for a duration once it has been "Secured" by someone coming to get it.
An item's gold fee is assigned by the system.
Buyers will be teleported to your hideout to buy the item from your Merchant's Tab.
You'll receive a notification when a trade has been completed.
The currency from your sales can be collected from the Earnings tab.
You can view the last 100 sales by clicking the Sales History button.}
<default>{Your Merchant Tabs can be renamed and recoloured.}

<cxinfocolour>{As a Buyer:}
<valuedefault>{Find "Securable" Listings on the Market Panel or the Trade Website.
Securing the item will teleport your character to the Seller's hideout.
Buy the item from the Seller's Merchant's Tab.}
<default>{Seller's tab can be reported for inappropriate naming.}
XBoxText.zh:
<valuedefault>{使用此系统需要先拥有商人页签。}

<cxinfocolour>{如何获取商人页签：}
<valuedefault>{在 2025 年 8 月 30 日之前购买的高级仓库页可免费转换为商人页签。
仓库页转换只能通过网站进行。
注意：转换后，您所选的高级仓库页将从个人仓库中移除，并成为商人页签。
您可以在商城购买商人页签。}

<cxinfocolour>{作为卖家：}
<valuedefault>{要上架物品，请将其放入任一商店标签页并设定价格。
一旦物品被前来购买的买家“锁定”，您在一段时间内将无法修改价格。
物品的金币手续费由系统自动设定。
买家将被传送至您的藏身处，从您的商人页签中购买该物品。
交易完成时您将收到通知。
出售所得货币可以从“收益”页中收取。
点击“销售历史”按钮可查看最近的100条销售记录。}
<default>{该商人页签可以重命名和更改颜色。}

<cxinfocolour>{作为买家：}
<valuedefault>{在市场面板或交易网站上寻找"可锁定"的物品列表。
锁定物品会将您的角色传送至卖家的藏身处。
从卖家的商人页签中购买物品。}
<default>{卖家的标签页若命名不当，可进行举报。}

<bigger>{<title>{Defer Mode}}
Pay 15% of an item's original cost to defer that item. 
This item will reappear in a later area, discounted by 10% of its original cost. 
More valuable items can take longer to reappear.

Items with a <<ritual_suspended>> icon were previously deferred and have been partially paid for.
Text.zh:
<bigger>{<title>{延迟模式}}
支付物品原价的 15%可延迟该物品。
该物品将在后续区域再次出现，并享有原价 10%的折扣。
越贵重的物品可能需要越久才能再次出现。

带有 <<ritual_suspended>> 图标的物品此前已被延迟，且已支付了部分费用。
